course_title: MATERIALS SCIENCE-STRUCTURE AND PROPERTY RELATIONS IN SOLIDS
description: Introduction to: atomic, electronic, and defect structures in materials; diffusional, mechanical and electrical properties of materials; and the role of structure and defects in diffusional, mechanical, and electrical properties.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 222and (CHEM 103,109, or115), or member of Engineering Guest Students. Students with credit forM S & E 350may not enroll inM S & E 351.
